description_long: This is a double-basin vessel sink unit featuring two oval white ceramic basins mounted on a thick, rectangular wooden countertop. Each basin is equipped with a modern, cylindrical metal faucet and a circular drain hole, with the plumbing fixtures visible beneath the countertop. The structure includes a matching wooden shelf below the main countertop, providing additional storage or support. The faucets are positioned at the rear of each basin, and the basins themselves are set above the counter, emphasizing a contemporary design. The underside reveals exposed piping and mounting brackets, indicating a robust and functional installation. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, suitable for upscale public restrooms or urban washroom facilities.
description: A modern double-basin vessel sink with white ceramic basins, metal faucets, and a wooden countertop with a lower shelf. Exposed plumbing and a clean, contemporary design are visible.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the basins, the thickness of the wooden countertop, and the alignment of the faucets.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting both basins, the symmetry of the faucets, and the full width of the wooden countertop and shelf.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the profile of the basins and the structure of the countertop.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the exposed plumbing, mounting brackets, and the underside of both the countertop and shelf.
attribute_drain_location: left basin: center, right basin: center
